title: Very heavy rainfall and severe heatwave warning issued for several states, list released | To read the entire bulletin issued by IMD | Inshorts - Inshorts
full_text:
Very heavy rainfall and severe heatwave warning issued for several states, list released
IMD has issued heavy to very heavy rainfall warning for parts of Assam, Meghalaya, Arunachal Pradesh, Bihar, Kerala, Puducherry, Karnataka, WB and Sikkim for Wednesday. Heatwave to severe heatwave warning has been issued for Chhattisgarh, Andhra Pradesh, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh, J&K, Ladakh, Jharkhand, Odisha, Telangana, Uttarakhand, MP, Haryana, Chandigarh, Delhi, Punjab, UP and Maharashtra.
